pattern_description: File server disk full issue — the volume is at 100% capacity causing write failures across services.
symptoms: no space left on device disk full 100% used write error file server disk usage critical partition full storage capacity reached
resolution_steps: echo Step 1/4: Copying older files to archive area over network...
echo Step 2/4: Re-running disk usage command to check available space...
echo Step 3/4: Monitoring logs for the next 5 minutes...
echo Step 4/4: Disk usage well within limits - turning off the alert.
resolution_summary: Copy older files to archive over network, re-run disk usage command, monitor logs for 5 minutes, turn off alert.

pattern_description: TLS certs expired issue — edge certificates have lapsed, clients cannot establish secure connections and receive certificate errors.
symptoms: x509 certificate has expired tls expired certificate NET ERR_CERT_DATE_INVALID TLS handshake failed certificate is not yet valid ssl cert expired
resolution_steps: echo Step 1/5: Fetching TLS certs and key files from S3 bucket (URL from config)...
echo Step 2/5: Installing certificates at the appropriate cert store...
echo Step 3/5: Restarting server to load the new certificates...
echo Step 4/5: Monitoring logs for the next 5 minutes...
echo Step 5/5: No issues found - turning off the alert.
resolution_summary: Fetch TLS certs from S3 (URL from config), install at cert store, restart server (approval required), monitor logs 5 minutes, turn off alert.

pattern_description: Call recording stopped mid-way. Media server which is entertaining a call and sending voice packets over RTP to call recorder. Call recorder converts the RTP to text and stores the transcript on a file server. The 3 components are communicating over network and are not co-hosted on a single system.
symptoms: call-recorder TranscriptWriter write error recording stopped mid-way media-server peer unreachable forwarding stalled file-server nfsd RTP stream dropped recording quota reached transcription queue full session dropping pipeline degraded
resolution_summary: Scan logs of all servers to narrow down on the faulty server / component. Spawn an agent to go to GitHub repo of the component and find the root cause with a proposal. Raise a NOC alert and attach the proposal.
